title: Sales Forecasting ML Pipeline — Nagendra Singh
content:
Nagendra’s 2024 Sales Forecasting framework. High-accuracy revenue projection using XGBoost and detailed feature engineering on historical retail data.

OBJECTIVE: The project aimed to solve the volatility in quarterly revenue projections for a mid-sized retail chain. By leveraging 3 years of transactional data, we built a pipeline that outperformed the existing moving-average model by 14% in MAE.

DATA ENGINEERING: Raw data was pulled from Snowflake, cleaned with Pandas, and enriched with external indicators like holiday calendars and competitor pricing indices. We used a rolling-window strategy for time-series validation.

MODELING & TUNING: XGBoost was selected after benchmarking against Prophet and ARIMA. Hyperparameters were tuned via Optuna, focusing on minimizing Mean Absolute Error (MAE) and ensuring robustness across seasons.

IMPACT: The resulting forecasts allowed the procurement team to reduce overstock by 22% in the first quarter of deployment. The dashboard now serves as the primary tool for executive financial planning.
